Container.Name: owlet-redroid
Container.Overview:
Headless Android (redroid) that runs the Owlet app 24/7 for the Owlet-To-Rtsp bridge.
REQUIRES host binder/ashmem kernel support and a privileged container. Run scripts/host-check.sh on the host FIRST. Create the docker network once: docker network create owlet-net
The androidboot arguments (GPU mode / resolution) are set in "Extra Parameters" via Post Arguments. /data is persisted so your app login survives restarts. Port 5555 is adb for the one-time install + login from your PC.

Config.Name: Android data (/data)
Config.Description: Persists app install + login across restarts.

Config.Name: adb port (host 5577 -> 5555)
Config.Description: adb — connect from your PC to 192.168.x.x:5577 (uncommon host port to avoid conflicts; maps to redroid's internal 5555).
